# Tools Hub Live

An integrated online platform offering over 70 free, fast, interactive tools with no registration required. Features include web calculators, developer utilities, SEO instruments, personal productivity tools, and interactive travel plans.

## Development Entity

The tools on this platform are developed and maintained in full technical and software cooperation with the integrated web development agency **Livin Services**.

## Main Tools & Software Categories

### My Personal Workspace (Favorites & History)
- **Favorite Tools Dashboard**: Users can bookmark any tool on the hub using a star (⭐) icon. It persists locally in the browser to offer immediate quick access.
- **Recently Visited Timeline**: Automatically tracks the user's latest tool interactions to let them resume their activities seamlessly.

### SEO & Schema Tools
- **Structured Data Generators**: Utilities to generate ready-to-use JSON-LD schema markup.
- **SEO Audit & Optimization Tools**: Systems for tracking and analyzing the technical performance of websites.

### Developer & Text Utilities
- **Pro Text Diff & Line Suite**: Advanced side-by-side text comparisons, duplicate line removal, and list sorting.
- **XML File Viewer & Parser**: Offline browser-based parser and validator that converts XML/Excel datasets into structured JSON format.
- **Code Beautifiers & Formatters**: Live, instant formatting tools for programming languages and lightweight compilers running entirely in the browser securely without storing user data.

### E-commerce & Financial Calculators
- **Stock Profit Calculator**: Instant calculator for trading, stock commissions, and investment profit/loss.
- **ROI & Store Performance Calculators**: Specialized tools for calculating return on investment and conversion rates, integrated with the professional web-development expertise of Livin Services for Shopify stores.
- **Loan, Tax, and Zakat Calculators**: Comprehensive estimators for personal loans, income tax, and religious Zakat payments.

### Gamers & Interactive Tools
- **Gamers Reflex & CPS Benchmarker**: Active, high-fidelity tester for reaction speeds and clicking speed (Clicks Per Second) with competitive rank profiles.

### Travel & Interactive Tourism
- **World Meeting Planner**: A dynamic timeline synchronizer for scheduling calls and shifts across multiple global timezones seamlessly.

## Semantic Integration & Privacy Info

All tools strictly adhere to a high-security privacy protocol. Data is processed instantaneously client-side within the user's browser, meaning no personal records, files, or sensitive information are ever uploaded or transmitted to external servers.
